explanation: This command uses a simplified and reordered syntax to achieve the same behavior as the original. It omits unnecessary elements and uses piping instead of intermediate variables while maintaining the ADS execution pattern.

This command substitutes long-form cmdlet names with their aliases (Get-Content -> gc, Invoke-Expression -> iex) and uses short PowerShell executable name (pwsh). It maintains the ADS execution behavior.
This command wraps the original logic in a subexpression with minimal syntax changes, preserving the ADS execution pattern while using a slightly different invocation structure.
